purpose: PRESEAL — non-confounded behavioural causal test of local memory individuation. Frozen before any prospective (52xxx) data.

environment.platform_note: chaotic RD-PDE: byte-identical determinism on THIS fixed platform (verified 420 floats max|d|=0), NOT cross-platform

coordinate_classification.secondary: order (m_minus, fast m1 e-fold~28 steps, not expected to survive washout)
coordinate_classification.justification: forgetting timescales eta_d1=0.35 vs eta_d2=0.006; frozen pre-observation

seeds.extension_note: 52001-52012 from FREEZE_SEAL; 52013-52024 pre-declared power-justified extension sealed HERE before any run (decode secondary needs ~18 worlds). No post-observation extension.

gates.G2_C-K2a_storage_readout: max(dose,order) storage-decode lowerCI > within-null95 & own-neigh CI>0
gates.G3_decode_SECONDARY_nongating: behavioural own-dose LOGO R2 lowerCI > within-null95 (underpowered n~9, p_power=0.10; reported OBSERVED/INDETERMINATE)
gates.G4_C-K4_nontriviality: eff_own not explained by size/mass/position/edge/env baselines (paired contrast cancels them common-mode)
gates.G5_C-K5_tracker_independence: G1-G4 verdicts hold under fixed-mask (tracker-free) readout
gates.C-K3_deep_turnover_dose: deep own-dose lowerCI>0.50 -> CERTIFIED else INDETERMINATE (inherited 0.368[0.14,0.72])
gates.G6_causal_individuation: passes ONLY if (G1&G2 specific storage) AND G3 (behavioural causal)

exclusion_policy: seed retained iff >=K=3 geometrically eligible targets (size>=45, pairwise>=24); reason recorded per seed; outcome-independent
no_preexisting_confirmation_data: verified (grep: no seed field 52001-52024 in any data file; no conf output file)
